cells.rationale: Contract-establishing proof-point task introduces the plugin/fork pattern across many files with judgment-heavy vendoring that downstream tasks inherit, warranting the top non-reserved band.
Forking with a judgment-call vocabulary compression and three dangling-reference retargets is new-pattern, design-sensitive work where a wrong abstraction propagates into the skill and its report.
The init adoption skill is the most intricate spec — multi-path landing contract, idempotent content-keyed delta, and several explicit edge behaviors — high uncertainty demanding opus at xhigh.
A single in-place enumeration sentence edit matching existing present-tense style is a tiny, reversible, low-blast-radius doc polish that sonnet handles literally and precisely.
